subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — and good memories of the conference! I'd be glad to get something formal on the calendar.

Here are three slots available next week for a 30-minute call:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Just let me know which works best and I'll send over a calendar invite.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal contact information directly. If the conversation develops and a senior technical introduction is the right next step, we'll make sure to facilitate that through the proper channels.

Thanks again for following up, and looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent, Company
